understanding.goal_understanding: The goal is to complete each level by reaching the goal gem tile marked '+' without landing on spikes, using a limited number of turns and attempts.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Horizontal movement triggers gravity-driven falling until landing on a solid tile, hitting a hazard, or reaching the goal. Click actions remove specified breakable tiles to open falling paths. Undo reverses the last action. Each level has 50 turns and 2 attempts, with a moving platform timer in some levels that counts down on horizontal moves. The corridor scan predicts landing positions per column, revealing passages to new vertical sections. Spikes cause instant failure.

Agent explained goal and mechanics.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal is to complete each level by reaching the goal gem tile marked '+' without landing on spikes, using a limited number of turns and attempts.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Horizontal movement triggers gravity-driven falling until landing on a solid tile, hitting a hazard, or reaching the goal. Click actions remove specified breakable tiles to open falling paths. Undo reverses the last action. Each level has 50 turns and 2 attempts, with a moving platform timer in some levels that counts down on horizontal moves. The corridor scan predicts landing positions per column, revealing passages to new vertical sections. Spikes cause instant failure.
